entries.title: Full-Stack Developer
entries.summary: Develops SaaS features with Vue.js/Nuxt.js and Directus, implements responsive UI designs, improves usability and accessibility, and integrates REST APIs.
highlights: Developed SaaS features with Vue.js/Nuxt.js and Directus.
Implemented responsive UI designs.
Improved usability, accessibility, and consistency of the platform.
Integrated REST APIs and optimized UI workflows.
Worked on the Role Compass talent profile feature, which reached 5,000+ users in the first month.
source_notes: Role, timeframe, and responsibilities come from the CV and locale files.
Role Compass outcome comes from the project docs and existing case study page.

entries.title: Software Developer
entries.summary: Built dynamic and responsive web applications and supported LeanERA's transition toward product-focused systems.
highlights: Developed dynamic and responsive web applications using JavaScript, Vue 3, Nuxt 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Ionic.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to evaluate and select technologies.
Established a clean, scalable codebase to support LeanERA's transition to a product-focused company.
source_notes: Details come from the CV, locale files, and the LeanERA case study page.

entries.title: Full Stack Web Developer
entries.summary: Developed user interfaces for an electric commercial vehicle comparison portal and maintained backend systems and databases.
highlights: Developed and implemented user interfaces for a new comparison portal for electric commercial vehicles and other websites.
Enhanced user functionality and experience.
Managed website administration, backend system maintenance, and database operations.
Delivered the EV comparison portal from concept to production in under three months as the sole developer.
source_notes: Role, timeframe, and responsibilities come from the CV and locale files.
Solo delivery and under-three-month launch come from the ARI Motors case study page.

entries.title: Social Media & Web Coordinator
entries.summary: Managed company website and social media channels and supported market research and affiliate marketing campaigns.
highlights: Managed company website and social media channels including Instagram, Telegram, and Facebook.
Conducted market research and affiliate marketing campaigns.
source_notes: Details come from the CV and locale files.

entries.title: AI Agents & Automations course
entries.summary: Current course focused on strengthening software development experience with AI agents, automations, LLM workflows, prompt engineering, APIs, webhooks, and AI safety.
highlights: Learning LLM workflows and prompt engineering.
Learning AI agents and automation workflows.
Working with n8n, Make, APIs, and webhooks.
Connecting Python automations and AI safety to existing full-stack development experience.
source_notes: The docs identify this as the current course; exact dates and location are not provided.

entries.title: Web- und Softwareentwickler/in
entries.summary: Completed comprehensive web and software development training covering frontend, backend, databases, authentication, REST APIs, Git/GitHub workflow, agile methodologies, and job-related German.
highlights: Completed web and software developer training in remote learning.
Covered HTML, CSS, modern JavaScript, responsive web design, React, Redux, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, Mongoose, JWT, REST APIs, GitHub team workflow, and agile methodologies.
Completed final project Plantastic.
Enhanced job-related German language skills at B2.2 level.
source_notes: Dates and curriculum come from public/certificate.pdf.
Institution location appears as Leipzig in the app locale data.
